rationale_short: Safety glazing material standards for vehicle windscreens and windows.
Installation requirements for lighting and light-signalling devices on non-motorcycle vehicles.
General safety requirements covering vehicle body, fittings, and occupant protection.
Smoke emission control limits for diesel-powered vehicles.
Rear vision mirror performance and installation requirements.
Emission control and OBD requirements for light vehicles under ADR 79/04.
Child restraint anchorage and anchor fitting requirements.
Definitions and classification of vehicle categories used throughout the ADR series.
Seat and seat anchorage strength and positioning requirements.
Brake system performance requirements for trailers.
Passenger car tyre performance, labeling, and marking requirements.
Seatbelt performance, installation, and anchorage requirements.
Brake system performance standards for commercial vehicles.
Controls, tell-tales, indicators, and illumination sources requirements per TSD 101.
Lamp, reflective device, and adaptive driving beam requirements including for three-wheeled vehicles.
